channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Analyst Says Tesla Will Deliver 1.6 Million Vehicles This Year, Says Robotaxi Scale Would Be Key Driver For TSLA
item.description: Analyst Andrew Percoco of investment bank Morgan Stanley believes Tesla Inc. deliveries could reach 1.6 million this year. 1.6 Million Deliveries, Energy Storage Miss In a new note released on Sunday, the analyst raised Tesla’s 2026 deliveries from 1.58 million to 1.6 million.

item.title: Intel Terafab Alliance With Musk Companies Puts Foundry Turnaround To Test
item.description: Intel (NasdaqGS:INTC) is partnering with Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI on the Terafab semiconductor project. The alliance targets manufacturing capacity for one terawatt per year of AI and robotics compute power. The deal centers on Intel’s foundry, AI chip manufacturing, and advanced packaging capabili...

item.title: Tesla Q1 2026 Deliveries Strengthen The Bearish Outlook
Wall Street Sees 22% Upside for Tesla (TSLA) This Year
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) is currently trading around $340.27, while the average Wall Street analyst price target sits at $416.15. That implies Tesla has roughly 22% upside today. Tesla’s 21.55% year-to-date decline has reset the stock to levels that force a genuine question: Is Wall Street seeing some...

item.title: Intel Joins Musk's Terafab, Shares Rise on Partnership News
item.description: Chipmaker partners with SpaceX, and Tesla, on a 1-terawatt AI chip complex in Austin

item.title: Intel Stock Rises After Joining Musk's Terafab Project
item.description: Intel Stock Rises After Joining Musk's Terafab Project

item.title: Tesla’s Cumulative Vehicle Sales Surpass 9 Million — And It Becomes #1 BEV Seller Again
item.description: Tesla’s vehicle sales have declined in recent years, and are basically stagnant in a good quarter these days. However, it is still one of the top EV sellers in the world. Actually, news is that it took back the title of #1 from BYD in the first quarter of 2026 ...

item.title: Tesla FSD v14.3 rolls out with MLIR rewrite, 20% faster reactions
item.description: Tesla has started rolling out Full Self-Driving (Supervised) v14.3 to HW4 vehicles, and the headline change is under the hood: Tesla rewrote the AI compiler and runtime from scratch on MLIR, which the automaker says delivers a 20% faster reaction time. The update, shipping as software version 202...

item.title: Intel (INTC) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
item.description: Shares of computer processor maker Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) jumped 2.9% in the afternoon session after it announced a major partnership with Elon Musk’s "Terafab" project, a joint venture with Tesla and SpaceX.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Stock Drops Despite Market Gains: Important Facts to Note
item.description: The latest trading day saw Tesla (TSLA) settling at $346.65, representing a -1.75% change from its previous close.

item.title: Why Tesla (TSLA) Shares Are Trading Lower Today
item.description: Shares of electric vehicle pioneer Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) fell 3% in the afternoon session after escalating geopolitical tensions triggered a broad sell-off as investors reacted to a strict deadline set by the U.S. regarding the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Intel Is Joining Elon Musk's Terafab Project. The Deal Is a Win for the US Chipmaker
item.description: Intel said it's joining Elon Musk's terafab project with SpaceX, xAI and Tesla.

item.title: JPMorgan has a stark warning on Tesla stock
item.description: Tesla just missed on deliveries, missed on energy storage, and now has one of Wall Street's most prominent bears renewing his case for significant further declines. JPMorgan analyst Ryan Brinkman reiterated an Underweight rating on Tesla on April 6 and maintained his $145 price target, which ...

item.title: Intel Stock Jumps Following Elon Musk Chip Deal. Why the Turnaround Is Gaining Steam.
item.description: SpaceX and Tesla are tapping Intel to help the pair realize their AI dreams. “Terafab” is Elon Musk’s plan to vertically integrate into semiconductor production, which he believes will be a key bottleneck for AI in the coming years. The fab is a joint effort between Musk’s xAI, SpaceX, and Tesla,...

item.title: Tesla South Korea Sales Surge in Q1
item.description: Strong regional demand offsets global delivery concerns and boosts market share.

item.title: Tesla releases FSD 14.3
item.description: submitted by /u/txking12 [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla Full Self-Driving v14.3 rolls out: here’s what’s new
item.description: Tesla has officially started rolling out Full Self-Driving v14.3 to Early Access Program (EAP) members, and there are a lot of new improvements. We are in EAP and will be on the road with v14.3 in the coming hours , so we’ll have a lot of things to discuss over the next few days, especially comin...

item.title: Intel to Join Musk’s Terafab in Surprise Move, Lifting Stock
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- Intel Corp. is joining Elon Musk’s long-shot effort to develop semiconductors for Tesla Inc., SpaceX and xAI, marking a surprising twist in the chipmaker’s comeback bid.Intel will help the so-called Terafab project “refactor” the technology in a chip factory, the company said Tuesd...

item.title: Intel teams up with Elon Musk on his Terafab endeavor
item.description: Intel (INTC) is teaming up with Elon Musk in his new Terafab project, a joint venture between the tech billionaire's Tesla (TSLA), SpaceX (SPAX.PVT), and xAI to begin construction of a chip design facility.Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley breaks down the news.

item.title: Tesla: "Intel is joining Terafab! Tesla, @xAI and @SpaceX are launching the most epic chip-building effort ever – combining logic, memory & advanced packaging under one roof. https://terafab.ai"
item.description: submitted by /u/twinbee [link] [comments]

item.title: Pacific Fusion names head of New Mexico operations
item.description: The company that plans to build a $1 billion research and manufacturing campus in Mesa del Sol has named a new head of its New Mexico operations. Pacific Fusion named Josh Tech, a former Tesla employee, to the executive role on Monday. “Some career moves feel incremental.

item.title: Intel Rises 3% as SpaceX, Tesla, and xAI Tap Chip Giant for Ambitious TeraFab Project
item.description: Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) stock advanced 3% in Tuesday’s session, moving above $52 after news broke that SpaceX, Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA), and xAI are partnering with Intel on the ambitious TeraFab semiconductor initiative. The move builds on an already remarkable run for the stock, which was up 37.62% year...

item.title: Tesla’s Huge Sales Spike In Korea Shows What EV Buyers Still Want
item.description: Aggressive discounts helped drive a 330% jump in March, proving that affordability is still key.

item.title: Intel to Help SpaceX, Tesla Make Chips. Its Stock Is Up.
item.description: SpaceX and Tesla are tapping Intel to help the pair realize their AI dreams. “Terafab” is Elon Musk’s plan to vertically integrate into semiconductor production, which he believes will be a key bottleneck for AI in the coming years. The fab is a joint effort between Musk’s xAI, SpaceX, and Tesl...

item.title: Intel Partners With SpaceX, Tesla to Operate New Chip Plant
item.description: The Elon Musk-led companies plan to work with the semiconductor manufacturer at the Terafab project planned in Texas.

item.title: Tesla Stock: It's Cheap Again (Rating Upgrade)
Tesla Stock Falls Again -- JPMorgan Says Avoid Tesla at all Costs
item.description: Tesla earnings preview turns ugly as longtime bear slashes EPS estimate by 30%

item.title: A Faulty Weld Stopped Gravity Deliveries for 29 Days and Lucid Stock Is Down 64% Over the Past Year
item.description: A popular Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) alternative, Lucid Group (NASDAQ:LCID) shares are trading near their 52-week low at $8.81, down 64% over the past year and off roughly 16% year-to-date. The catalyst bringing Lucid back into Reddit’s crosshairs is a messy Q1 delivery report combined with a product re...

item.title: Intel teams up with SpaceX, Tesla and xAI on TeraFab project
item.description: Intel Corp (NASDAQ:INTC, XETRA:INL) has announced that it is joining Elon Musk’s TeraFab initiative, a project aimed at building large-scale semiconductor fabs to supply chips for AI, robotics, and space applications. The announcement was made on Tuesday via a post on Musk’s social media...

item.title: Tesla Stock Tumbles, Cathie Wood Buys Shares For First Time Since July
item.description: ARK Invest purchased Tesla stock for the first time in almost a year on Monday. Tesla shares fell solidly Tuesday to a seven-month low.

item.title: Tesla: Three Scenarios, Zero Upside
Intel Lands Musk’s $25 Billion Terafab: A Billion-Dollar Foundry Win in the Making?
item.description: Fresh off reports Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) is in advanced talks with Google and Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN) for advanced packaging services on custom AI chips, the chipmaker is back again reporting yet another boost to its foundry ambitions. Intel announced today that it is joining Elon Musk’s Terafab projec...

item.title: Tesla Model Y ownership review after six months: What I love and what I don’t
item.description: It has been just over six months since I took delivery of my Diamond Black Tesla Model Y Premium Long Range (at that time, it was called the Tesla Model Y Long Range All-Wheel-Drive). In those six months, I have had the opportunity to experience true and pure electric vehicle ownership , what com...

item.title: Tesla News Brief NHTSA Probe Closure And Texas Terafab Chip Plans
item.description: The US National Highway Traffic Safety Administration has closed its probe into Tesla's "Actually Smart Summon" feature, reducing regulatory overhang around this automated driving capability. Tesla, Intel, SpaceX, and xAI plan to build the Terafab AI chip facility in Texas to address AI chip supp...

item.title: Tesla Stock Is Dropping—and Cathie Wood’s ARK Is Buying the Dip
item.description: Tesla stock fell early Tuesday, leaving shares down 22% this year. ARK Invest’s Cathie Wood is buying the dip. Tesla stock was down 3.9% at $338.93, while the and were down 0.9% and 0.8%, respectively.

item.title: Tesla Drops 4% as EV Demand Fears, SpaceX IPO Uncertainty, April 22 Earnings Loom Large
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) shares are down 4% in midday trading on Tuesday, sliding from $352.82 to less than $339. The drop adds to a rough stretch for the stock, which is now down 25% year-to-date. Three overlapping pressures are driving today’s selling: persistent EV demand concerns following a Q1 de...

item.title: Intel Joins Elon Musk's Terafab Chip Factory Project
item.description: Chipmaker Intel is partnering with billionaire Elon Musk to develop his Terafab semiconductor factory. Intel stock rose on the news.

item.title: Tesla dodges more headaches as autonomous driving scores a win
item.description: Tesla scored a rare victory with the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) on Monday after the Office of Defects and Investigations decided to close its investigation into its Actually Smart Summon tech, which allows drivers to summon their parked vehicles to them using just thei...

item.title: Could 2026 Be The Year Tesla’s (TSLA) Foreign Sales Recover?
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of the 8 Best American Stocks to Buy for the Next 5 Years. On April 2, Tesla, Inc.

item.title: Broadcom expands Google, Anthropic deals; Intel joins Musk's Terafab
item.description: Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman takes a look at some of Tuesday morning's trending tickers and stories.Shares of health insurers, including UnitedHealth (UNH), Humana (HUM), and CVS (CVS), are soaring on news that the government will increase private insurer reimbursements by 2.48%.Broadcom (AV...

item.title: Here Comes SpaceX’s IPO. Should You Board on Day One?
item.description: There’s more to Elon Musk than just Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) stock. And soon, retail investors will be able to get a piece of a company that may very well outshine the electric vehicle (EV) and robotics powerhouse. With EV sales and shares of Tesla under considerable pressure in April, perhaps there’s...

item.title: If Magnificent 7 Executives Don’t Believe In Their Stocks, Should You?
item.description: The Magnificent 7 — Apple (NASDAQ:AAPL), Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN), Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOG)(NASDAQ:GOOGL), Meta Platforms (NASDAQ:META), Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT), Nvidia (NASDAQ:NVDA), and Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) — have powered the market’s AI-driven rally, lifting their combined market capitalization past ...

item.title: Elon Musk’s Terafab project locks up massive new partner
item.description: Elon Musk’s Terafab project just locked up a massive new partner, just weeks after the new project was announced by Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI, the three companies that will be direct benefactors from it. In a landmark announcement on April 7, Intel joined Elon Musk’s Terafab project as a key partner...

item.title: The Last Tesla Model S And Model X EVs Just Got $15,000 More Expensive
item.description: The Model S and Model X are dead, and the last units on the lot just got a big price hike.

item.title: Tesla won’t really build its own chip fab — Intel is going to do it
item.description: Tesla is not actually going to build its own chip fab. Intel is going to do it for them. That’s the real takeaway from Intel’s announcement today that it is joining the “Terafab” project alongside Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI — the $25 billion Austin chip factory Elon Musk unveiled with great fanfare l...

item.title: Tesla driver passes out drunk on Autopilot — arrested for DUI
item.description: A Tesla driver was found passed out behind the wheel of his car as it drove itself through busy streets in Vacaville, California. Police caught up with the vehicle and arrested the driver on suspicion of driving under the influence of both alcohol and marijuana. It is the latest in a long string ...

item.title: Is Tesla (TSLA) Still A Good Deal After Recent Share Price Weakness?
item.description: If you are wondering whether Tesla at around US$352.82 is still a fair deal or if the story is already priced in, this article walks through the key numbers that matter for value focused investors. The stock has had a mixed run recently, with a 0.7% decline over the last 7 days and an 11.1% decli...

item.title: Tesla Stock Is Down 22% This Year. Cathie Wood Is Buying the Dip.
item.description: FEATURE Tesla stock fell early Tuesday, leaving shares down 22% this year. ARK Invest’s Cathie Wood is buying the dip. Shares of the electric-vehicle maker were down 0.3% at $351.67, while and futures were down 0.

item.title: Tesla Stock (TSLA) Revs Up as Regulators Take No Action Over “Actually Smart Summon” Crashes
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) stock revved higher in pre-market trading today after safety regulators closed an investigation into its Actually Smart Summon vehicle feature. No Action Needed The U.S. National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) said today that it had closed its over-a-year-long investig...

item.title: The Rivian R2’s EPA Numbers Are In, And It Beats The Model Y Where It Counts
item.description: Rivian’s most powerful R2 has more range than initially estimated, and it's more efficient than the Tesla Model Y.
